title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
We at GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Ahmedabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group:
GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
